calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Lerche, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is off calendar, dismissal on file. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Process And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joe Helfrick, Esq. 916-920-2295 of Nelson & Kennard for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court calls Line 5 (CGC-17-563229) and Line 7 (CGC-18-564211) simultaneously. Plaintiff argues sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON's Motion To Quash Service Of Process And Request For Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

*** after hearing on order is signed granting defendnat's motion to quash service of process and awarding sanctions ***
